en: Now that you've had some distance from when you first did the role to now what has been the thing that people have
talked to you most about your performance or the film A lot of people have seen it several times because it's
so rich and also your perspective alters between if you see the first time or if you see the second time or
even the third time So they always find something new It's strange because it moves people from all generations
and all cultures and all over the world
